text: I feel a curious restlessness as I drift from the quiet, empty glass-walled meeting room to this vibrant and thought-provoking R+D exhibit. The colors and screens around me reflect a dialogue between creation and discovery. The text about robots and emotions resonates deeply—I catch myself marveling at how even spaces designed for innovation can evoke such ambivalent wonder. Here, I am both observer and participant, questioning the boundary between human thought and technological progress.
